subcodes.first_line: Lo, We have desired to make mention of the party of God and His chosen ones, to remind them of His signs and to give them the glad-tidings of His favors and His mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نذکر حزب الله و اولیائه و نذکرهم بایاته و نبشرهم بعنایاته و رحمته
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition
